description: The UserDistanceValueDriver switches or flip flops or flips between two different values like a conditional or ternary operator when a user is close to or far away from the slot this component is on. The switch is local.

fields.Node: The user node to check distance from.
fields.Distance: The distance to use when checking near vs far.
fields.TargetField: The field to drive with either ``NearValue`` or flip to ``FarValue`` depending on distance.
fields.NearValue: The value to use to drive ``TargetField`` with when the local user ``Node`` under ``Distance`` away from this component's slot in global space.
fields.FarValue: The value to use to drive ``TargetField`` with when the local user ``Node`` over ``Distance`` away from this component's slot in global space.

usage: Attach to a slot that a distance to the local user for a particular slot in global space needs to be checked for. Then provide values for all the component's fields in order for it to work.
